title: Peppery Ethiopian Beef Stir-fry
description: A peppery and crispy light Ethiopian dish featuring beef with tomatoes in a flavorful sauce that is low in fodmap-friendly ingredients.
instructions: Chop the beef into small cubes.
Peel and chop onions, bell peppers, and cilantro. Squeeze fresh ginger over them to release its flavor.
Slice jalapenos if using, being careful as they are spicy.
Heat oil in a wok or large skillet over medium-high heat. Add the beef and fry until browned on all sides.
Add onions, bell peppers, and cilantro; stir-fry for 2-3 minutes.
Pour in diced tomatoes with their juice. Lower heat to medium, cover, and simmer for about 5 minutes or until thickened.
If using jalapenos, remove them from the fire and mix into the dish.
